repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: Quotient row-space IF frontier, BJS and estimator m IF-equivalent iff Gamma_m(pi,Sigma,a) tau = 0

published_prior_art.cite: borusyak_jaravel_spiess_2024_restud / sun_abraham_2021_joe / callaway_santanna_2021_joe / wooldridge_2023_ectj give estimator-specific or restricted equivalence results, not a four-estimator IF iff frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: variance-difference identity and quotient row-space variance gap relative to BJS

published_prior_art.cite: chen_santanna_xie_2025 and roth_santanna_2023 derive EIF/efficiency benchmarks, but not the stated four-estimator contrast-covariance formula

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: Aggregation equality is not an IF equality certificate

published_prior_art.cite: goodman_bacon_2021_joe and dechaisemartin_dhaultfoeuille_2020_aer decompose TWFE failures, not equal-target unequal-IF projections across BJS/SA/CS/W

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: prior Gamma/K_star/Z_M projection-loss object was nonunique

published_prior_art.cite: wooldridge_2023_ectj gives restricted saturated-regression/imputation equivalences, not this BJS correction map

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The C(pi,Sigma,G,T,a) tau = 0 iff frontier is the same repo kernel as eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1's Gamma_m(pi,Sigma,a) tau = 0 quotient row-space IF frontier; tier=field below novelty_target=flagship unless the contrast is made strictly stronger than that prior banked proposal.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The BJS-centered variance-gap identity is already present in repo form in eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1, with this version mainly adding the BJS-orthogonal condition.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The setup defines only the BJS-orthogonal residual component via (C_m tau)'S_m^perp, so C tau = 0 does not by itself eliminate a possible BJS-span component of IF_m - IF_BJS.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The projection map is constrained by RB(G,T)=R_BJS B(G,T), so the advertised correction-to-BJS conclusion on the treated-cell span is largely built into the definition rather than derived from C_m tau = 0.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace C with an augmented contrast that explicitly includes the BJS-span loading, and state the iff as vanishing of both span and orthogonal components.
State a strict repo increment over eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1, for example a closed-form primitive construction of C with a uniqueness theorem that the Gamma proposal did not have.
Rewrite Conjecture 3 so the Schur-complement map is characterized by restrictions independent of the desired BJS equality, then compute the full A_m and violation vector in Exhibit 9.2.

recommended_next_step: Revise rather than pivot: the published gap is plausible, but the repo duplicate and missing BJS-span term must be fixed before this can meet a flagship novelty target.
